hero_description: A streamlined hot update delivery platform built for app developers. Create apps, manage versions, and distribute updates with a single click.
feature_1_desc: Generate unique UIDs for your apps automatically. Get started in seconds with zero configuration.
feature_2_desc: Configure version numbers, download URLs, and changelogs. Keep your users always up to date.
feature_3_desc: Separate admin and user dashboards. Fine-grained control over who can manage what.
cta_subtitle: Join developers who trust our platform for hot update delivery.
no_apps: No apps yet. Create your first app to get started.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
no_keys: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
key_generated: Key generated successfully. Make sure to copy it now.
tutorial_intro: This guide walks you through integrating the HotUpdate API into your mobile application.
step1_desc: Sign in to your dashboard and create a new app. You will receive a unique App UID automatically.
step2_desc: Navigate to the API page and create an API key linked to your app. Save the key securely.
step3_desc: Use the check update endpoint to query the latest version available for your app.
step4_desc: If a new version is available, download it from the provided URL and apply the hot update.
endpoint_desc_check: Returns the latest version info for the specified app.
res_download_url: Download URL for the latest version
res_has_update: Whether a new version is available
